release_notes:
Initial public release of WireTrace.

- Multi-device tabbed interface — connect to multiple serial ports simultaneously, isolated per tab
- Sustained throughput above 10,000 lines per second on commodity hardware
- Buffered logging with guaranteed disk flush on shutdown
- Severity-based message classification (CRITICAL, ERROR, WARNING, INFO, DEBUG, COMMAND, DATA)
- Live filter bar — narrow the on-screen view without affecting the disk log
- Search with forward and backward navigation
- Two-mode CSV export — auto-detect (key:value, JSON) and raw
- Studio Light and Midnight Dark themes
- Auto-update from GitHub Releases
- Hex display mode
- Editable baud rate (50 to 4,000,000)
- Windows 10 and later (64-bit)
